title: Expanding areas under Israeli control in Gaza increase risks to civilians, UN warns
label: War File
summary: The continued expansion of areas under Israeli control in Gaza since October’s ceasefire agreement is placing civilians at greater risk and severely constraining humanitarian operations, the UN and humanitarian partners warned on Wednesday.
